title: Utilitiar
description: This project adds a few useful QoL features for survival
body: Utilitiar is a client-side Fabric utility mod for Minecraft 1.21.11+ focused on practical survival QoL features. It adds a clean utilities menu with toggleable helpers such as Excavator for selected-area mining, customizable waypoints with item icons and colors, Auto Tool, Auto Sprint, Safe Walk, Hotbar Restock, Durability Alerts, Coordinates HUD and more. Designed for everyday survival play, Utilitiar keeps useful tools easy to access without feeling bloated.
